objective: Increase externally verified candidate coverage with explicit mathematical worksheets on cases that still have weak verified agreement.

router.input: all candidates from visible-holdout-01 and visible-holdout-recovery-01 that exactly recovered their own removed public suffix
router.selection_rule: Route a case when its most-supported verified future tuple has support at most three.
router.ranking_rule: maximum verified support ascending, total verified survivors ascending, unique verified answers descending, case_id ascending

fairness: Every selected case receives all eight worksheets. Subjects see only a case ID, a prefix shortened by one public term, and the request for six continuation terms. No family, generator, answer, removed term, or prior-agent evidence is supplied.
retry_rule: Never rerun a valid output. Retry only an identical logical job after schema or infrastructure failure and preserve all ledgers.
interpretation_rule: This is open development. A selector and prompt portfolio must be frozen before any new fresh performance gate.
